name: scenario_Layer_base_pipeline
description: Core pipeline: build Layouts→Grid→Layer→RainbowEffect→Drivers→ArtNetSendDriver from scratch and verify each module wires correctly. Drives the bounded FPS check at the end so a render-path regression is caught.

steps.name: add-grid
steps.description: Add a 128x128 GridLayout child to Layouts. Set explicitly (the module default is 16x16x1) so the tick is above the host's microsecond clock resolution — a 16x16 grid renders in <1us on desktop, flooring tick to 0.

steps.name: add-layer
steps.description: Add a top-level Layer wired to the Layouts container, RGB (3 channels per light).

steps.name: add-rainbow
steps.description: Add RainbowEffect as the Layer's only effect.

steps.name: add-driver-group
steps.description: Add a top-level Drivers container wired to the Layer's output buffer.

steps.name: add-artnet
steps.description: Add ArtNetSendDriver and run the bounded FPS measurement (expected to stay at >=80% of the rated FPS for the 128x128 grid this scenario builds; min_pct needs a live baseline, so it gates only on hardware and is skipped with a WARN in the desktop runner).
